data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Guide assignment' for the tour experience. However, the evidence indicates that only 2 bookings have been confirmed, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants needed to proceed with the tour. This gap in participant numbers directly impacts the ability to assign a guide, thus failing to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: Only 2 confirmed bookings exist, failing to meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants for guide assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the guide assignment requirement.
